text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If ya just perk up those ears of yours, you'll be
able to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Piercin' the sky, shakin' the earth, and grippin'
your very soul!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's the sound of a festival, burstin'
with heart and style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You there, and you! Take a moment and lend me
your ear!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Born 'n' raised among the real locals, I'm the
Umamusume with Oi flair! It's me, the Edo
girl—Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Lemme spin ya a tale like no other, of an all-out
battle of legendary proportions! The grand
festival of the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes on me 'til the very end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, Inari One and I are officially
taking on the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume races are largely divided into two
categories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One is the Twinkle Series, which is governed by
the URA. These are the central races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other category comprises races overseen by
the National Association of Umamusume, also
known as NAU.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: These races—referred to as regional races—are run mainly on dirt at racecourses like Oi, Kasamatsu, and Funabashi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One, being associated with the Oi team, was
expected to run her debut as a regional racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I just had to try scouting her after being
captivated by her running. Eventually, she
developed an interest in central races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with the support of the people from her
hometown, Inari One transferred to Tracen
Academy and signed a contract with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she and her hometown folks have put
their trust in me, I can't let any of them down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With renewed determination, I make my way to
the training track, when...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Bring it ooooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beneath the clear skies, Inari One's booming
voice echoes across the training track.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: The great Inari's burnin' hot today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fierce and sharp, every step she takes seems to
hammer her raw fighting spirit into the earth. The
spectacle stirs my very soul.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Tracen Academy track's in real proper
shape today. Gotta give the maintenance folks
props!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Boss! What the heck? How long ya been
standin' there?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Boss! What the heck? How long ya been
standin' there?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no need to apologize. Figured I'd get here
a lil' early and do some warmin' up 'fore ya came.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no needa apologize. Figured I'd get here a
lil' early and do some warmin' up before ya came.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Welp, we're finally here! The start of our quest
through the Twinkle Series! The long, flowery
road to glory for the great Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aww yeah! Can't wait to get out there 'n' race! I'm
gonna send fireworks into the sky with my victory!
choice_data_list:
Let's make sure you do well in your debut race
first!

Let's make sure you do well in your debut race
first!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You bet! Don't pull any punches with my trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya know, though... I'm sure gettin' a lotta stares
today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's this group eyeballin' me since I started
runnin'. Look, check out the seats.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so that's the transfer student. She seems
pretty capable... but a bit rough around the
edges, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Regional racers really run differently, don't they?
They say that girl from Kasamatsu has a pretty
unique form too.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Heh. Let's see how far they'll make it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tch, same ol' story. Scopin' out the new kid to see
what the big deal is.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit annoying havin' so many eyes on me, but
nothin' worth fussing over. This academy doesn't
get many transfers after all.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let 'em flap their mouths now. Once they see me
in a real race, they'll be eating those words!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't changed a bit since arriving
here—always standing tall and brimming with
confidence. As her trainer, I need to rise to the
same level.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! Time to refocus 'n' get back to the track!
What's the game plan for today?
choice_data_list: First, I want to set a goal.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
A goal? Well, I don't have anything specific in
mind, but...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: The Twinkle Series is huge. I wanna turn that into my own, ultimate festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Then I wanna stand right there at the heart of the
festival 'n' roar out a declaration!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Here I am, Inari One! I'm the Edo Horsegirl, born 'n'
bred in Oi!
choice_data_list: That's a good goal, very like you!
That's a good goal, very like you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, for real? We must think alike, eh, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, izzat right? We must think alike, eh, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Kay, with that set, let's get right to trainin'! I
can't sit still anymore!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with increased determination, Inari One
and I begin our training session.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I worked up a real sweat today! Can't wait for a
great bath after this!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You too, Boss! Let's keep it up tomorrow—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You too, Boss! Let's keep it up tomorrow—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Inariii!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Look at you! You were more fired up than usual,
hm? ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Like Creek said, that was some powerful
footwork.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two Umamusume who call out to Inari One
are two runners destined to become her future
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One is Super Creek, recognized for her stamina
and tactical prowess, with all the makings of a
future champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other is Oguri Cap, who, like Inari One,
transferred from the regional circuit and has
slowly been turning heads with her extraordinary
talent.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you guys've really been tearin' it up too,
though! I can tell jus' by lookin' at ya!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. ♪ Well, seeing you putting in so much
effort made me realize I can't afford to lose.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We might be competing in the same races after
all!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Since I come from from Kasamatsu, it's been
really great seeing another regional racer giving it
their all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But just so you know... I won't hold back if we end
up competing in the same race. I have no
intention of losing.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to hear! Comin' at me with a
challenge right off the bat!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm lookin' forward to the day we all put on one
helluva festival!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. See you around then.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse us. ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I really can't afford to fall behind. I feel like I'm the one walkin' away here with the bigger motivation boost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she mentions it, Inari One saw Oguri
Cap and Super Creek racing when she first visited
Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't doubt they'll give her that extra push by
becoming her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! I almost forgot! Do you have a lil' time
after this?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! I almost forgot! Do you have a lil' time
after this?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Annnd, we're done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following our training session, Inari One changes
clothes and proceeds to carry several tatami mats
into my office, laying them out on the floor like
an island.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Boss, but I jus' can't relax without these.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Boss, but I jus' can't relax without these.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Since I'll be spendin' a lotta time in here with ya
from now on, I figured I'd go ahead 'n' borrow a
bit of floor space!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's share a drink to mark the occasion.
I'll brew us some tea.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I said this before, but I'm really lookin' forward to
workin' together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us sit on the tatami mats, steaming
cups of tea raised, and make a vow for our
journey ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We share a final moment of peace before we
throw ourselves into the war zone of the Twinkle
Series!
